statement: The williams_pipeline barrier does NOT apply to AC0 because its combinatorial measure is non-natural in the Razborov-Rudich sense.
informal_description: Template-synthesized conjecture connecting majority hardness to AC0 via williams_pipeline.
motivation: Template synthesis over known circuit classes/functions/techniques.
falsification_path: Search for small-n counterexamples or known-inclusion proofs.
implication_if_true: Progress on explicit lower bounds near P vs NP frontiers.
